heroHeadline: PLA Exercises Reach Record Scale as 2027 Capability Milestone Approaches
heroSubtitle: China's Justice Mission-2025 exercise (Dec 2025) deployed 130 aircraft sorties and 46 vessels — the largest PLA maritime mobilization ever recorded around Taiwan. Analysts assess the drill as a comprehensive blockade rehearsal, signaling continued escalation toward the PLA's 2027 centenary modernization milestone.
footerNote: Data sourced from Taiwan MND, US DoD, CSIS ChinaPower, Global Taiwan Institute, Reuters, AP, and institutional analyses. All claims reflect multi-pole sourcing across Western, East Asian, and international media.
